GpuSortExec: expr=[am_pm_ratio@0 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
  GpuProjectExec: expr=[CASE WHEN pmc@1 = 0 THEN None,23,8 ELSE CAST(amc@0 AS Decimal128(15, 4)) / CAST(pmc@1 AS Decimal128(15, 4)) END as am_pm_ratio]
    GpuCrossJoinExec
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[count(*)@0 as amc]
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(*)]
          GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
